 {"id":"frankenredis-vmw","title":"Implement cjson.encode and cjson.decode in Lua evaluator","description":"## Problem

fr-command/src/lua_eval.rs line 1565: cjson is stubbed with a comment \"cjson stub (commonly used in Redis scripts)\". The cjson library is one of the most commonly used libraries in Redis Lua scripts for JSON serialization/deserialization.

## What Redis Provides

Redis bundles cjson (lua-cjson) which provides:
- cjson.encode(value) → JSON string
- cjson.decode(json_string) → Lua value
- cjson.encode_sparse_array(value) → JSON with sparse array handling

Common usage pattern:
  local data = cjson.decode(redis.call('GET', 'user:1'))
  data.visits = data.visits + 1
  redis.call('SET', 'user:1', cjson.encode(data))

## Implementation Plan

Since we already depend on serde_json in fr-conformance, we can add it to fr-command:

1. cjson.encode: Convert LuaValue → serde_json::Value → JSON string
   - LuaValue::Nil → JSON null
   - LuaValue::Bool → JSON bool
   - LuaValue::Number → JSON number
   - LuaValue::Str → JSON string (UTF-8)
   - LuaValue::Table → JSON object or array (based on table structure)

2. cjson.decode: Parse JSON string → serde_json::Value → LuaValue
   - JSON null → LuaValue::Nil
   - JSON bool → LuaValue::Bool
   - JSON number → LuaValue::Number
   - JSON string → LuaValue::Str
   - JSON array → LuaValue::Table (array part)
   - JSON object → LuaValue::Table (hash part)

## Edge Cases

- Empty table: encode as {} (object) or [] (array)? Redis cjson defaults to object.
- Mixed table (both array and hash keys): Redis cjson errors on this.
- Very large/deep structures: need recursion depth limit
- Non-UTF-8 strings: cjson.encode errors on these

## Files to Modify

- crates/fr-command/Cargo.toml: Add serde_json dependency
- crates/fr-command/src/lua_eval.rs: Replace stubs with real implementations","status":"closed","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:08:24.155327935Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T04:57:49.062059532Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T04:57:49.061162918Z","close_reason":"cjson.encode/decode already fully implemented with custom JSON serializer. Fixed misleading 'stub' comment.","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-vmw","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-7vn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:08:27.928473121Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
+{"id":"frankenredis-vsc8","title":"redis parity: runtime BGSAVE snapshot regression should wait for background completion","description":"Full fr-runtime runs are still red on bgsave_writes_rdb_snapshot_when_path_is_configured because the runtime regression asserts the configured RDB file exists immediately after BGSAVE returns. The runtime path reports Background saving started first and finalizes state via child-process completion, so the regression needs to wait for completion before asserting on-disk artifacts.  {"id":"frankenredis-w1m","title":"Wire CONFIG SET busy-reply-threshold (lua-time-limit) to runtime","description":"## Problem

fr-runtime/src/lib.rs line 1294 defines `const COMMAND_TIME_BUDGET_MS: u128 = 5000`. This matches Redis's busy-reply-threshold default (5000ms) but is not configurable.

## What Redis Does

CONFIG SET busy-reply-threshold <milliseconds> controls when Redis starts rejecting commands with BUSY errors during long-running scripts or operations. CONFIG SET lua-time-limit is the legacy name.

## Implementation Plan

1. Add command_time_budget_ms to ServerState (initialized to 5000)
2. Handle CONFIG SET busy-reply-threshold and lua-time-limit (both set the same value)
3. Replace the const usage with the runtime field

## Files to Modify

- crates/fr-runtime/src/lib.rs: Add field, CONFIG SET handler, replace const","status":"closed","priority":2,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:05:16.267291289Z","created_by":"ubuntu","updated_at":"2026-03-25T03:42:13.058081750Z","closed_at":"2026-03-25T03:42:13.056821354Z","close_reason":"busy-reply-threshold/lua-time-limit wired: ServerState.command_time_budget_ms + CONFIG SET/GET + replaces const","source_repo":".","compaction_level":0,"original_size":0,"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"frankenredis-w1m","depends_on_id":"frankenredis-kgn","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-03-25T03:05:19.891477646Z","created_by":"ubuntu","metadata":"{}","thread_id":""}]}
